# chalk_datasource_kafka (Resource)

Manages a Chalk Kafka datasource integration.

**Required permissions:** `secrets.write`, `secrets.decrypt`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bootstrap_server` (Attributes) Comma-separated list of host/port pairs (`KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bootstrap_server))
- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID that this datasource is scoped to.
- `name` (String) The name of the datasource integration.
- `topic` (Attributes) The topic to subscribe to (`KAFKA_TOPIC`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--topic))

### Optional

- `additional_kafka_args` (Attributes) Additional engine arguments as JSON (`KAFKA_ADDITIONAL_KAFKA_ARGS`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--additional_kafka_args))
- `aws_region` (Attributes) AWS region for MSK cluster, required when MSK IAM Auth is enabled (`KAFKA_AWS_REGION`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_region))
- `aws_role_arn` (Attributes) IAM role ARN to assume for MSK authentication (`KAFKA_AWS_ROLE_ARN`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_role_arn))
- `client_id_prefix` (Attributes) Client ID prefix (`KAFKA_CLIENT_ID_PREFIX`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--client_id_prefix))
- `config` (Attributes Map) Additional configuration for the datasource. Must not contain keys managed by the named attributes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `dlq_topic` (Attributes) Topic to send messages to when message processing fails (`KAFKA_DLQ_TOPIC`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dlq_topic))
- `group_id_prefix` (Attributes) Group ID prefix (`KAFKA_GROUP_ID_PREFIX`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group_id_prefix))
- `msk_iam_auth` (Attributes) Enable AWS MSK IAM authentication. Valid values: 'true', 'false' (`KAFKA_MSK_IAM_AUTH`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--msk_iam_auth))
- `sasl_mechanism` (Attributes) Authentication mechanism for SASL. Valid values: PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512 (`KAFKA_SASL_MECHANISM`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sasl_mechanism))
- `sasl_password` (Attributes) Password for SASL authentication (`KAFKA_SASL_PASSWORD`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sasl_password))
- `sasl_username` (Attributes) Username for SASL authentication (`KAFKA_SASL_USERNAME`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sasl_username))
- `security_protocol` (Attributes) Protocol used to communicate with brokers. Valid values: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL (`KAFKA_SECURITY_PROTOCOL`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security_protocol))
- `ssl_ca_file` (Attributes) Path to SSL CA File (`KAFKA_SSL_CA_FILE`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssl_ca_file))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the datasource integration.

Optional:

- `literal` (String, Sensitive) A plain-text value.
- `secret_id` (String) The ID of an existing Chalk secret.
